testcase.name: 3150-concept-relationship-node-arcname-testcase
Concept Relationship Node Arcname Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using a concept relationship node with different arcnames

variation.name: Concept relationship node for standard presentation arcs
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A second, non-standard, presentation linkbase is present, but this is ignored. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for standard presentation arcs, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A second, non-standard, presentation linkbase is present, but this is ignored.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for custom presentation arcs
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in a custom presentation linkbase that uses a non-standard arc name. Relationships from the standard presentation linkbase are ignored. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for custom presentation arcs, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in a custom presentation linkbase that uses a non-standard arc name. Relationships from the standard presentation linkbase are ignored.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with an arcname expression
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in a custom presentation linkbase that uses a non-standard arc name specified using an XPath expression. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with an arcname expression, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in a custom presentation linkbase that uses a non-standard arc name specified using an XPath expression.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with an arcname expression that does not evaluate to a QName
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the arc name using an XPath expression that does not evaluate to a QName.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a arcname expression that evaluates to a sequence
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the arc name using an XPath expression that evaluates to a sequence of more than one QName.
